title: SCoPE-MS Protocol for Cell Sorting and Analysis
author: Bogdan Budnik
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bgt4jwqw
materials: Conver up the plate and freeze until sorting.

Once the thermocycler has hit 90C and at least 5 minutes in the -80 have passed, put the plate into the thermocycler and hit resume (thermocycler will hold 90C for 10 minutes and then go to 4C) 00:10:00
Once the thermocycler has gone down to 4C remove the plate and spin it down.

steps.title: Put 1ul of HPLC grade water...
steps.instruction: Put 1ul of HPLC grade water into each well of a plate using the Nanodrop or a multi-channel pipette.

steps.title: For suspension cells simply place 1...
steps.instruction: For suspension cells simply place 1 to 2mL of cell culture in an Eppendorf tube and start step 8. For Adherent cells start at step 4.

steps.title: Wash with 2mL of PBS at...
steps.instruction: Wash with 2mL of PBS at 37C 2ml for a 6mm plate and 4ml for a 10mm plate

steps.title: Add 1ml of Acutase for a...
steps.instruction: Add 1ml of Acutase for a 6mm plate and 2ml for a 10mm plate, and incubate at 37 C for 5 minutes

steps.title: Pipette Acutase around the plate to...
steps.instruction: Pipette Acutase around the plate to wash off all the cells and place in a 2mL Eppendorf tube

steps.title: Spin down cells at 4C at...
steps.instruction: Spin down cells at 4C at 500 rcf for 2 minutes

steps.title: Remove supernatant without disturbing the pellet,...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant without disturbing the pellet, and re-suspend in PBS at 4C

steps.title: Spin down cells at 4C at...
steps.instruction: Spin down cells at 4C at 500 rcf for 2 minutes

steps.title: Remove supernatant without disturbing the pellet,...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant without disturbing the pellet, and re-suspend in PBS at 4C

steps.title: Sort cells using teh FACS sorter
steps.instruction: Sort cells using teh FACS sorter. *protocol for this can be found here: https://www.protocols.io/view/aria-plate-sorting-j4kcquw *ensure that there is a bulk carrier that can be used for the cells sorted, or else you musk make your own

steps.title: Place place the plate into the...
steps.instruction: Place place the plate into the -80 for at least 5 minutes 00:05:00

steps.title: Turn on the HEATLYSE protocol (90C...
steps.instruction: Turn on the HEATLYSE protocol (90C for 10 minutes) on the thermocycler and hit pause

steps.title: If doing 1 plate, make 120ul...
steps.instruction: If doing 1 plate, make 120ul of a 200mM TEAB, 10ng/ul trypsin solution. Dispense 1ul of of this solution to each well. (Goal here is to have a 2ul reaction with a final concentration of 100mM TEAB and 10ng/ul Promega trypsin gold).

steps.title: Run the DIGEST protocol on the...
steps.instruction: Run the DIGEST protocol on the thermocycler (37C or 45C for 3 hours depending on trypsin used and then goes down to 4C) 03:00:00

steps.title: Once the digest is complete, add 0
steps.instruction: Once the digest is complete, add 0.5 ul of the appropriate 85mM TMT label to each single cell well (Single cells: 127N, 128N, 128C, 129N,129C ,130N, 130C, 131N, 131C, Carrier: 126, Reference: 127C)

steps.title: Let samples incubate for 1 hour...
steps.instruction: Let samples incubate for 1 hour at room temp (22C) 01:00:00

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5 ul of 0.5% hydroxylamine to all samples, and let incubate at room temp for 30 min. 00:30:00

steps.title: Add 1ul of bulk carrier (contains...
steps.instruction: Add 1ul of bulk carrier (contains 100cells worth of material labled 126 and 5 cells of material labeled as 127C) along with 0.5ul of 20% FA to one of the wells in the set.

steps.title: Aspirate all of the contents of...
steps.instruction: Aspirate all of the contents of the well where the carrier and FA was added and transfer it to the next well in the set.

steps.title: Keep aspirating everything in the well...
steps.instruction: Keep aspirating everything in the well dispensing it in the next well aspirating everyting and moving onto the next well until the entire set is in the pippette tip.

steps.title: Empty all this material in the...
steps.instruction: Empty all this material in the pippette tip into an MS glass insert, and add water or evaporate liquid so that 12ul are left in the tube.

steps.title: Place the insert in a labled...
steps.instruction: Place the insert in a labled MS vial and cap the vial with a pierceable cap

steps.title: Submit to QE using SC method, injecting 10 ul
steps.instruction: Submit to QE using SC method, injecting 10 ul
